info.title: bankstract-cloud API
info.description: Statement parsing API for Nigerian banks. Parse a PDF/XLSX statement into structured transactions over a single HTTP call. API consumers interact over HTTP and do not inherit the AGPL-3.0 license of the hosted service.

get.description: Returns 200 once the process is up. No auth, no dependencies checked.
Reports whether the audit DB and the parsing engine are reachable. `degraded` means one is down and the worker should not take traffic.
Returns the running worker version and the bundled bankstract engine version.
The bank ids the engine can auto-detect, for the optional `bank` parse override.
Successful parses across the key owner's keys this cycle, the tier cap, and the projected overage in NGN. Failed parses never count.
Admin-only. Aggregates audit metadata across all keys owned by `owner` for the current cycle. Powers the dashboard Overview + Usage.
Admin-only. The usage-to-paid funnel derived from existing metadata: demo parses, API parses, owners with a key, and active subscriptions. No client tracking.

delete.description: Admin-only. Cancels any live Paystack subscription, then deletes every row tied to `owner` (keys, subscription, cycle tiers, invoices, audit metadata). Right to erasure (NDPR). If the Paystack cancel fails, nothing is deleted (a live charge is never orphaned).

schema.title: Response Delete Owner V1 Admin Owner Delete

post.description: Admin-only. Returns the raw key exactly once; only its argon2 hash is stored.

get.description: Admin-only. Lists key metadata (never the raw key) for an owner, including revoked keys for the audit trail.

delete.description: Admin-only. Marks the key revoked (never deletes it, for the audit trail). A revoked key stops parsing immediately.

post.description: Admin-only. Initializes a Paystack transaction for the tier's plan and returns inline-checkout params. apps/app proxies this; the Paystack secret stays worker-side.

get.description: Admin-only. The owner's tier, status (active/inactive/none), and current period end. The dashboard reads this; the worker is the source of truth.

post.summary: Bill the owner's current overage (admin, manual)
post.description: Admin-only. Computes this cycle's overage from audit success counts and raises a Paystack invoice for it. Manual trigger until an end-of-cycle cron lands.

Upload a PDF (or XLSX) statement and get structured transactions back. `?format=json` (default) returns ParseResponse; `?format=csv` returns the engine-serialized CSV. `redact=true` returns the redacted document bytes. The file is parsed in memory and never written to disk.

post.summary: Submit a long parse as an async job
post.description: Queue a statement parse and stream engine progress over Server-Sent Events. Returns 202 with a job_id, an SSE stream_url, and a poll_url fallback. Mirrors /v1/parse: `?format=csv` and `redact=true` are supported. json rides the SSE result event; csv and redact bytes are fetched from /v1/parse/jobs/{id}/result. Use this for large statements; small ones are faster on the synchronous /v1/parse.

get.description: Server-Sent Events for a job: data lines carry {stage,current,total} progress, then a final `event: result` carries the ParseResponse (success) or the error envelope. No Authorization header: the unguessable job_id is the capability, since EventSource cannot send headers. One consumer per job.
JSON snapshot of a job, the polling fallback to SSE. result appears once state is done; the error fields once failed.

The byte channel for csv/redact jobs (the SSE result event carries JSON only). Returns the ParseResponse JSON for a json job, or the CSV / redacted bytes for csv / redact. 404 until the job is done, or after its result is swept.

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description:
Error envelope for all non-2xx responses. `error_class` is one of:

- `EncryptedSourceError`: source is password-protected
- `EmptyStatementError`: parsed clean, zero rows (see `marker_coverage`)
- `LayoutDriftError`: bank detected, structure broke
- `ReconciliationError`: totals don't match the statement
- `ParseError`: last-resort parse failure
- `AuthError` / `PayloadTooLarge` / `RateLimitError` / `ServiceUnavailable` /
  `WorkerError`: framework concerns

`marker_coverage` is populated only for `EmptyStatementError`: high coverage with
zero rows ≈ legitimately empty; lower coverage ≈ silent layout drift.

JobAccepted.title: JobAccepted
JobAccepted.description:
202 response from POST /v1/parse/jobs. Open the SSE `stream_url` for live progress, or fall
back to polling `poll_url`.

JobSnapshot.title: JobSnapshot
JobSnapshot.description:
Poll fallback for an async parse job. For a `json` job, `result` is the ParseResponse once
`done`. For `csv`/`redact`, the bytes are not inlined: fetch them from `result_url`. The error
fields are populated once `failed`.

KeyCreatedResponse.title: KeyCreatedResponse
KeyCreatedResponse.description: Returned once, on creation. The only time the raw key is ever exposed.

tags.name: Parse
tags.description: Turn a statement into structured data.

tags.name: Keys
tags.description: Issue, list, and revoke API keys (admin-only).

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Paystack subscription checkout, status, and webhook.
